caption: In a large, well-lit ballroom with high ceilings and elegant chandeliers, a group of people are practicing martial arts on a blue mat. Two individuals are dressed in yellow uniforms, while several others wear blue uniforms. In the initial frames, a person in yellow performs a dynamic movement, extending their arm and shifting their weight, while a person in blue moves backward. Another person in blue stands in the background on the right, also in a martial arts stance. As the sequence progresses, the person in yellow continues their motion, transitioning into a wide stance with their arm raised. The others in blue move in coordination, shifting their positions on the mat. A crowd of spectators is visible in the background, seated and watching the demonstration. The lighting remains constant, and no text or logos are visible on the screen.
